subcodes.first_line: O thou whose pen moveth with the utterance of proof, from the day thou didst journey forth from the blessed Threshold, protected and preserved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تحرک قلمه ببیان البرهان از یومیکه از آستان مبارک محفوظ و مصون سفر نمودید
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
